errorBoundary.title: An unexpected error occurred in the interface
errorBoundary.hint: You can reload the app. If the error keeps happening after updating, restart the program.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again or restart the app.
errors.noDatabase: The database is not ready yet. Restart the app.
errors.noWindow: The app window is not available.
errors.badPin: PIN must be at least 4 digits.
errors.database: Could not save to the database. Try again.
errors.network: Could not reach the network. Check your connection.
errors.backupInvalidFile: This backup file is invalid or corrupted.
errors.backupUnsupportedVersion: This backup version is not supported by the app.
errors.backupCorruptRow: The backup file contains invalid data.

home.title: Home
home.subtitle: A quick overview of your account stats and payments
home.onlineAccountsHint: All your site accounts — free or paid — in one place.
home.attentionLine: Due date: {{date}} — tap «Mark paid» once confirmed
home.markPaidErrorBody: Could not write to the database. Try again or restart the program. Reason:
home.noDueSoon: No upcoming due dates in the list yet.
home.statsCashflowHint: The amounts below are the sum of expected payment dates in each period (each full payment in its month, not spread across other months). For yearly/monthly calendar views and year-over-year comparisons from actual payments, use the «Spending & Calendar» page.
home.cardsExpiringSoonHint: Cards that need renewal or an update in payment methods
home.allCardsExpired: All recorded cards are expired — review payment methods.
home.welcomeHint: Here is an overview of your subscriptions this month.
home.cashflowHint: Expected amounts by period in your primary currency.

list.title: All records
list.subtitle: All active records — paid or currently free. Details from the Accounts page.
list.filtersPanelHint: The view updates automatically; «Refresh list» to fetch immediately.
list.name: Name
list.empty: No subscriptions yet. Add from «Add» or from the list.

cancelled.title: Accounts deleted from sites
cancelled.subtitle: Accounts you cancelled or deleted from the service — you can no longer sign in on the site. Reactivating means the account works again.
cancelled.empty: No deleted accounts at the moment.

accounts.title: My online accounts
accounts.subtitle: All your internet accounts — free or with a subscription — with email, site, and signup reason. No passwords stored.
accounts.searchExplain: Search by site name, URL, or email. Paid and free accounts together — you can change status later from details.
accounts.noSearchResults: No results for this search or filter.

form.newUnifiedHint: Each record is an online account. Choose whether it is currently free or has a subscription/payment — you can change that later from details.
form.accountPayFreeHint: Free account: site, email, and signup reason only — no amounts or due dates.
form.accountPayPaidHint: Recurring subscription or one-time payment — enter amount, payment method, and dates.
form.freeEmailHint: Helps you remember where you used this email later.
form.freePurposePlaceholder: Example: tech newsletter, trial service, backup account…
form.freePurposeHint: Write a short reason to remind you why you created the account.
form.freeCreatedAtHint: For reference only — does not affect financial reminders.
form.title: Title
form.websiteFaviconHint: When you enter a valid address, the site logo appears automatically next to the name.
form.accountLabelPlaceholder: Example: your email on the service, family, or secondary account
form.accountLabelHint: Distinguishes multiple subscriptions on the same site or different family member accounts.
form.intervalCountHintYear: For the first registration (e.g. 5-year domain): set the count to cover the initial term. On each later renewal, choose the term from the details page without changing this number if you prefer.
form.noCategoriesHint: No categories yet; you can add them here or from Settings → Categories.
form.noCurrenciesHint: Currencies are ready from the global list.
form.recurringStartRequired: For recurring: enter a start date so the app can calculate the next due date.
form.paymentMethodHint: Choose a payment service or a card you added in Settings → Payment Methods. One method per subscription — either a service or a card directly.
form.needsPaymentMethodBody: Add a payment service or wallet, or register a credit card from Settings → Payment Methods so the subscription can be linked when saving.
form.editCancelledHint: This subscription is in the cancelled archive (since {{date}}). You can edit data for review; to restore it to active lists, use «Reactivate» from the details page.
form.editCancelledHintBody: Cancellation will not be removed automatically when saving.
form.trialEndsOnHint: Optional — reminds you before the trial converts to paid.
form.renewalCancelled: Auto-renew cancelled (subscription may still run until period ends)
form.duplicateWarningHint: Review the list above to avoid duplicate entries.

onboarding.welcomeBody: In a few short steps we'll set up the app: your summary currency, optional lock, then a payment method if you like. This app is for desktop (Linux) only — not phones or tablets.
onboarding.currencyHint: Stats and approximate amounts are shown in this currency. You can change it later in Settings.
onboarding.languageHint: You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.pinHint: You can require a PIN on every launch for more privacy, or continue without a lock.
onboarding.pinEnableChoice: I want to enable a PIN on launch
onboarding.paymentHint: If you add a service (such as a wallet or gateway), it will appear when you add a subscription later. You can skip this step and return from Settings → Payment Methods.
onboarding.paymentAccountPlaceholder: Your ID on the service, email, or phone…
onboarding.skipPayment: Skip for now — I'll add later
onboarding.paymentAccountRequired: Enter your account details on the service, or choose «Skip for now».

detail.paymentsSectionHint: Record one payment, or generate several backdated payments if the subscription is old.
detail.paymentsLedgerEmptyExplain: If there was a due payment you actually paid and the date was updated via «Mark paid» but this ledger is empty, it may be from older versions that did not write payments here during confirmation, or the write failed (you would see an alert). To compensate: open the «Record payment» panel above, or generate past cycles. From now on, «Mark paid» creates one stable row in the ledger (with the due cycle date you paid), with a single database confirmation.
detail.advanceRecurring: Update next due date after this payment
detail.advanceRecurringHint: If enabled: after saving the payment, «Next due» advances by «Renewal term for this payment» above (or the default count in the form if left blank). Good for domains: a 5-year payment then a 1-year payment without changing subscription settings. Turn off to keep dates as they are.
detail.renewalStepsThisPayment: Renewal term for this payment (number of interval steps)
detail.renewalStepsHint: Each «step» = one interval unit in the subscription (e.g. one year if the interval is yearly). Domain example: first time 5, next time 1 or 2 depending on what you paid.
detail.backfillExplain: Adds a payment record at the subscription amount for each mid-period due date, according to the subscription interval (e.g. monthly). Previously recorded dates are skipped.
detail.backfillAdvanceNext: After generation: update «Next due» to the first cycle after today
detail.backfillNeedsRecurring: The subscription must be recurring to use this option.
detail.backfillUntilBeforeFrom: End date cannot be before start date.
detail.backfillNothingNew: No payments to generate (all dates may already exist).
detail.confirmDeleteSub: Delete this record and all its payments?
detail.needsPaidHint: This record has reached or passed its due time. Tap «Mark paid» after confirming to update dates (for recurring), or it will stay highlighted for attention.
detail.freeAccountHint: Your account is still on the site with no current payment. To enable a paid subscription use «Add paid subscription» or change the record type.
detail.paidAccountHint: This account is linked to payment. If you stopped the subscription but your account remains on the site, use «Stop subscription — keep account».
detail.stopPayTitle: Stop subscription while keeping the account
detail.stopPayConfirm: Payment and due-date tracking will be removed; the account stays as a free account. Previous payment history remains for review. Continue?
detail.markAccountDeleted: I deleted my account from the site
detail.accountDeletedConfirm: You will no longer be able to sign in to this site with this account. The record moves to «Deleted accounts». You can reactivate if the account comes back. Continue?
detail.paymentsDisabledCancelled: Recording new payments is not available for deleted accounts
detail.paymentsReadOnlyCancelled: You can only review previous payment history. To add new payments, reactivate the account from the details page.
detail.renewalCancelledBody: You turned off auto-renewal; the subscription may remain active until the current period ends.

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Name
categories.confirmDelete: Delete this category? Linked subscriptions may lose their category.
categories.duplicate: A category with this name already exists.
categories.statsOverviewHint: Number of categories and active subscriptions in each (excluding cancelled).
categories.uncategorizedHint: Active subscriptions not assigned to a category

stats.title: Summary
stats.yearlyFromMonthlyHint: Equals monthly estimate × 12 based on each subscription's recurring rate.
stats.refreshFx: Update exchange rates from the network

insights.title: Spending & Calendar
insights.subtitle: Due dates on the Gregorian calendar, current-year estimate, and comparison of your recorded payments.
insights.cashflowExplain: Each due date is counted at the full period amount (e.g. monthly subscription in its payment month, or yearly in its renewal month). Amounts are not spread across other months.
insights.tapForMonth: Tap to view days in this month
insights.monthGridHint: Days with a light color have a payment due. Tap a subscription name for details.
insights.historyExplain: Choose a month or subscription (or «All») to view payment details: date, amount, and what was paid for. Default sort is newest first.
insights.historyTrendUp: About {{pct}}% higher than the previous year
insights.historyTrendDown: About {{pct}}% lower than the previous year
insights.historyTrendUpFlat: Slightly higher than the previous year
insights.historyTrendDownFlat: Slightly lower than the previous year

settings.title: Settings
settings.dangerZoneTitle: Danger zone — erase all local data
settings.languageHint: Interface language for menus, screens, and messages.
settings.dangerResetIntro: Deletes all subscriptions, payments, categories, payment methods, and local copies for this app on this device, then creates a new empty database. This cannot be undone.
settings.dangerResetExportHint: If you need a copy, export a backup from the «Export & backup» tab before continuing.
settings.dangerResetStep1Prompt: Click below only if you are absolutely sure. We will ask you to type a random number to confirm.
settings.dangerResetChallenge: Type this number in the field, then press «Execute wipe»:
settings.dangerResetExecute: Execute full wipe and empty the app
settings.dangerResetCodeMismatch: Number does not match. Try again or cancel.
settings.primaryCurrencyHint: Used in stats and the estimate box when you pay in another currency.
settings.testNotifyBody: This is a test message with sample subscription lines.
settings.pinHint: Optional. When enabled, the code is required on every launch. Save after entering the code twice to confirm.
settings.pinHintShort: Protects app launch. Activation status is shown below; use the buttons to set or change the code.
settings.pinStoredPausedHint: A code is saved but launch prompt is currently off.
settings.pinChangeStepCurrent: Enter your current PIN to continue changing it.
settings.pinChangeStepNew: Choose a new PIN and confirm it twice.
settings.pinSetTitle: Set login PIN (enter twice to confirm).
settings.pinLockPausedOk: Launch PIN prompt stopped; the PIN is still saved.
settings.pinRemoveBoxTitle: Permanently remove PIN from this device
settings.pinRemoveBoxHint: The stored PIN will be removed entirely and will not be required on launch; you can set a new one later if you wish.
settings.pinRemoveConfirm: The PIN will be deleted from this device and will not be required on launch. Confirm removal?
settings.pinRemovedOk: PIN removed and lock disabled on this device.
settings.fxExplain: Uses an available network source to store «latest reference rates in USD», then estimates your currency amount against the primary currency. If the connection fails, the last stored rates remain; if nothing is stored or the currency is missing, the built-in estimate fills in.
settings.fxStepLive: If the request fails, a message with a brief reason appears below the button.
settings.fxStepBuiltin: Without a network fetch, approximate built-in numbers are used (may not cover every currency).
settings.fxStepOverrides: You can set manual multipliers as JSON below: amount × multiplier = value in primary currency.
settings.fxErrorDetail: Error details from network or processing
settings.refreshFxButton: Update exchange rates from the internet
settings.currenciesHint: Currencies are built into the app.
settings.confirmDeleteCurrency: Remove this currency from the list?
settings.currencyInUse: Cannot delete: subscriptions use this currency.
settings.fxOverrides: Manual overrides (multiplier to primary currency). JSON:
settings.fxOverridesInvalid: Invalid JSON format. Use numbers only as values, e.g.: {"USD":3.64}
settings.desktopOnly: Desktop (Linux) only — does not run on phones or tablets.
settings.remindersHint: When the app opens: notify with names and amounts due within the number of days you choose (once per calendar day). Your system must support desktop notifications.
settings.reminderDaysHint: For example, 7 means every subscription due within a week from today appears in the alert.
settings.reminderWeekly: Weekly alert with upcoming due summary (within two weeks)
settings.reminderSchedHint: Sent once per calendar week or month when the app opens if subscriptions are due within the digest period.
settings.budgetHint: Optional cap for projected spending this month (primary currency). Shown on Home when set.
settings.shortcutsHint: Works outside text fields. Press ? anywhere for the full list.
settings.autoBackupHint: Saves a full JSON backup to a folder on a schedule, even when the app runs in the tray.
settings.backupReminder: No manual backup recorded yet — consider exporting from this tab.
settings.updateCurrent: You are on the latest version ({{version}}).

pin.title: Enter login PIN
pin.subtitle: This device has lock enabled
pin.mismatch: PIN and confirmation do not match

payment.pageSubtitle: Credit cards, payment services, and wallets — subscriptions link to them when added.
payment.accountOnService: Your account or ID on the service
payment.optionalLinkCard: Link a saved card (optional — shown if you have cards)
payment.savedCardPickerHint: This list shows cards you added under «Credit card». Pick one to link to this service, or leave «None» if there is no link.
payment.cardDescriptionHint: Shown when choosing the card in a subscription or wallet link; useful if you have more than one card of the same type.
payment.confirmDeleteCard: Delete this card? Links from services and subscriptions will be removed.
payment.cardExpired: Card has expired based on the displayed month.
payment.expiryBarHint: The bar nears the end as expiry approaches

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.hint: One file saves the entire app: accounts, payments, categories, payment methods, and all settings. On another device, tap «Restore» and choose the same file — the app returns as it was with no extra options.
backup.versionHint: File format version: {{exportV}} — the app reads older files automatically.
backup.restoreConfirmBody: Everything on this device will be replaced with the file contents — accounts, payments, categories, payment methods, and settings — so the app matches the backup.
backup.restoreWarningBody: Any current data on this device will be deleted and replaced by the file. If you are not sure, back up this device first.
backup.previewFileCounts: In file: {{subs}} account(s), {{pays}} payment(s), {{cats}} category(ies), {{cards}} card(s), {{wallets}} payment method(s)

export.csvHint: UTF-8 file with headers; opens in Excel or LibreOffice.
export.icsHint: Due dates as all-day events; import the file into your calendar app.

notify.digestBody: You have {{count}} record(s) due within a week.
notify.digestIntro: You have {{count}} subscription(s) due within about {{days}} days:

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Available from any screen (except while typing in a field).

fx.fetchError: Could not fetch rates from the internet. Check your network or try later; you can still use the built-in estimate or manual overrides.
fx.updated: Rates updated and saved locally for the app.
fx.builtinHint: The current estimate does not fully rely on a live fetch if no rates have been loaded yet.
fx.rateMissingHint: Not enough rate data for this currency. Add a manual multiplier, refresh rates, or choose a better-supported primary currency.
fx.offlineKeepBuiltin: Could not reach the server; values use last saved rates or the built-in estimate.
fx.noLiveCacheYet: No successful internet fetch saved yet; built-in estimate remains active until the first successful update.
